title: Review and Audit Existing Documentation
description: Thoroughly review the current documentation page and supporting docs to identify gaps, inaccuracies, or areas needing refinement based on the PRD and developer journey.
details: Audit the existing documentation (including the newly created docs page) for completeness, clarity, and alignment with the PRD. Identify missing sections (e.g., setup, usage, architecture, troubleshooting), unclear instructions, or outdated content. Make a checklist of improvements needed before refining the docs.
test_strategy: Compare the documentation against the PRD and developer onboarding flow. Ensure all major features, setup steps, and developer workflows are covered. Validate that the checklist of improvements is comprehensive and actionable.

title: Refine and Expand Documentation Content
description: Update and enhance the documentation based on the audit, ensuring clarity, completeness, and alignment with best practices.
details: Address all gaps and improvement areas identified in the audit. Add or revise sections such as project overview, setup instructions, folder structure, development workflow, authentication/AI modules usage, infrastructure provisioning, troubleshooting, and FAQs. Ensure language is clear and concise, and examples are up-to-date. Use markdown formatting and code snippets where appropriate.
test_strategy: Review the updated documentation for completeness and clarity. Ask a peer to follow the docs for onboarding and provide feedback. Ensure all PRD requirements and developer journey steps are addressed.

title: Add Visual Aids and Diagrams
description: Enhance the documentation with diagrams and visual aids to clarify architecture, workflows, and infrastructure setup.
details: Create and embed diagrams illustrating the monorepo structure, frontend/backend interaction, authentication flow, and Terraform infrastructure. Use tools like Mermaid.js or draw.io for diagrams. Place images/diagrams in a dedicated assets folder and reference them in the markdown docs.
test_strategy: Verify that diagrams are clear, correctly referenced, and improve understanding of complex topics. Solicit feedback from a developer unfamiliar with the project to ensure visuals aid comprehension.

title: Implement Documentation Navigation and Index
description: Improve discoverability by adding a navigation sidebar or index to the documentation page.
details: If the docs page supports it, implement a sidebar or table of contents for easy navigation between sections. Ensure all major topics are linked and the navigation updates as docs evolve. For markdown-based docs, use anchor links or a generated TOC.
test_strategy: Test navigation for usability and completeness. Ensure all sections are accessible via the sidebar or index and links work as expected.

title: Peer Review and Final Polish
description: Conduct a peer review of the refined documentation and make final adjustments based on feedback.
details: Share the updated docs with at least one other developer for review. Address any feedback regarding clarity, accuracy, or usability. Perform a final proofread for grammar, formatting, and consistency before merging changes.
test_strategy: Ensure all peer feedback is addressed. Confirm that the documentation meets the PRD's usability and maintainability standards. Validate with a final onboarding walkthrough using the docs.
